title: Rich message features: reactions, edits, deletion, threading, mentions
description: Implement Message/set update operations. Reactions: stored as Id[Reaction] map keyed by senderReactionId (not an array). Client adds reaction by patching 'reactions/<senderReactionId>': {emoji, sentAt}; server sets senderId to 'self' and propagates. Client removes by patching 'reactions/<senderReactionId>': null. No addReaction/removeReaction keys — pure JSON Pointer paths. Edits: MessageRevision history. Deletions: deletedAt tombstones and deletedForAll. Threading: replyTo and threadRootId (senderMsgId index). Mention validation. All live in local daemon data store — relay still sees only opaque MLS blobs.
close_reason: Implemented: Message/set update (reactions, body edit, soft-delete, readAt/burn-on-read), destroy (hard-delete). senderExpiresAt/burnOnRead fields on create. DB v2 migration. Background expiry reaper task. All tests pass.
